platforms such as Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud for scalable data storage, integration, and security.Solid foundation in DevOps practices to ensure robust, automated infrastructure for continuous data integration and deployment.Ability to analyze business and technical problems, proposing solutions that balance trade-offs between cost, speed, and reliability.Excellent communication and collaboration skills to interact with cross-functional teams and present technical concepts to stakeholders.Demonstrated commitment to best practices in data engineering, including data governance, quality, and documentation.Roles and ResponsibilitiesDesign, implement, and maintain scalable, efficient, and reliable data architectures for diverse business requirements.Develop and optimize robust data pipelines, ensuring high data quality, low latency, and scalability across platforms.Utilize Microsoft Fabric (Mandatory skill) in building enterprise data solutions, enabling seamless integration across services.Collaborate with data scientists, analysts, and product teams to identify and deliver data-driven innovations.Champion best practices in data modeling, ETL development, and workflow orchestration tailored to client needs.Monitor and troubleshoot data processes, proactively resolving issues to ensure uninterrupted data availability.Implement DevOps methodologies for continuous integration and delivery of data engineering projects.Ensure compliance with data governance standards, maintaining adequate documentation of all data systems and workflows.Mentor junior data engineers, guiding them in technology adoption, quality assurance, and professional development.Stay updated with emerging technologies, recommending tools and methodologies that enhance the company’s data ecosystem.
To apply: https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/aliqan-technologies-data-engineer

item.title: Blockchain & Climate Institute: UNPAID VOLUNTEER - Web Developer
Yoko Co: Development Contractors (Full Stack, Front-End, Back-End)
item.description:
Headquarters: McLean, VA URL: https://www.yokoco.com/
We’re looking for developers (Full Stack, Front-End, Back-End) with a strong sense of teamwork and a desire to write code to join our first-choice contractor partner pool. Think of it more like being a VIP member of our extended team, rather than taking on a full-time position. How this works:
If you qualify for our contractor pool, we’ll reach out whenever we need an extra pair of hands. When a project fits your schedule, you’ll have complete flexibility to say yes and provide an estimate for the work, and no pressure when it’s not the right match. We intentionally limit the size of our contractor pool to only a small handful of reliable, capable developers. We’d rather build long-term relationships with a few good coders who can function as an extension of our team, than have a race-to-the-bottom free for all whenever we get a new project. This is a great way to work on interesting challenges and collaborate with a passionate team, while still keeping the flexibility and autonomy you get as a freelancer. Heads up: We have a strong preference for working directly with individuals or small teams, rather than contracting out to whitelabel engineering companies.
Who we’re looking for: In addition to being able to support our standard tech stack, we’re also looking for people who can help expand our capabilities. We’ve included a list below of some of the core abilities that we most frequently find useful, though it’s not necessarily all-encompassing. If you feel like we have enough meaningful overlap, we encourage you to reach out.
Advanced WordPress development skills, including traditional WordPress implementations, Full Site Editing (FSE) setups, headless configurations, and Gutenberg. Strong ability with Javascript, and experience working with various JS technologies and modern front-end frameworks, like React, Vue, Node, Next, etc. Experience working with APIs to build integrations, and, in particular, hands-on experience implementing SSO in web applications. Search technologies, like Algolia, Typsense, or similar platforms. Strong ability with Git, PHP, MySQL, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS, and an aptitude for documentation. Great communication skills and the ability to translate business requirements into technical solutions and explain technical concepts in accessible terms.
We’re also interested in people with experience working with:
AI technologies in regards to search and building RAGs.  Headless/modern CMSes, like Craft, Strapi, and other similar platforms. 
Why work with Yoko Co?
Do good, better: We exclusively serve clients who make a positive impact on the world. This is your chance to build things that help create a better place for all of us. High performance, no jerks. You’ll collaborate with good people who believe in doing great work. Best Place to Work (and that’s not just our opinion). We’ve been named a Best Place to Work by the Inc. 5000 and Washington Business Journal. Long-term relationships. Many of our contractors and partners work with us repeatedly over time. We invest in people, not just projects.
We value working with people who are motivated by our mission and driven to make a positive impact. If you have a passion for excellence, a growth mindset, and a commitment to collaboration, we’d love to team up! To apply: If you’re interested, you can apply for this position via our application form. Note: We take applicants from all over the world. However, you must be willing to work a schedule that includes some overlap with normal US business hours. 
To apply: https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/yoko-co-development-contractors-full-stack-front-end-back-end

item.title: OnTheGoSystems: Senior Ruby on Rails Developer
item.description:
Headquarters: Remote URL: http://onthegosystems.com
We’re looking for a Senior Ruby on Rails developer who enjoys owning meaningful features, building reliable systems, and working in a mature, high-trust engineering environment. This is an individual contributor role for an experienced backend engineer who cares deeply about code quality, testing, and long-term impact.
Why Join OTGS?
Stable & self-funded: Founded in 2007, profitable, and independent — we build for the long term.
Industry leaders: Creators of WPML, the № 1 multilingual plugin for WordPress, powering over 1.5 million sites
Real product impact: You’ll work on ATE, a core product at OTGS with real customers, real scale, and real technical challenges.
Fully remote, async-friendly: Work from anywhere within EMEA hours as part of a global, distributed team.
Engineering-driven culture: We value ownership, autonomy, testing, and thoughtful problem-solving.
Growth without chaotic hype: Mentorship and long-term career paths without chaos.
Fair compensation + great benefits: Designed to support your well-being both inside and outside of work.
What You’ll Do
Own features from implementation to production within a well-defined product scope
Build and maintain robust Ruby on Rails systems used at scale
Work closely with product and other developers to solve real user problems
Write and maintain automated tests (unit, integration, and E2E)
Improve performance, reliability, and maintainability of existing systems
Take responsibility for the quality and long-term health of what you build
What We’re Looking For Required
4+ years of professional experience with Ruby on Rails
Strong backend engineering skills and database experience
Solid experience writing and maintaining automated tests (including E2E)
Experience building and running production systems
Comfortable working autonomously and taking ownership
Strong problem-solving mindset, you look beyond tickets
Experience with Web APIs
Availability during EMEA working hours
Nice to Have 
Experience with React 
CI/CD experience (GitLab, Jenkins, or similar)
Background jobs, AWS, or complex integrations
Experience with Capybara
This Role Is a Great Fit If You:
Take pride in ownership and accountability
Care about testing and long-term code quality
Prefer stable, product-focused work over short-term hype
Enjoy collaborating with thoughtful, kind, and experienced people
Want to make a lasting impact on a product used by thousands of real customers? Apply now!
To apply: https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/onthegosystems-senior-ruby-on-rails-developer-1
